name: Cleric
flavor: Realms at War — new archetype. A battlefield chaplain: no offense of its own, fragile, but a powerful well of recovery (see FRAMEWORK.md heuristic 5). Mirrors the Medic worked example.

specialAction.name: Lay On Hands
specialAction.summary: Remove up to 2 Wounds total, split between this Warrior and one allied Warrior within yellow range. No valid target needed.

effects.text: Remove up to 1 Wound from an ally in yellow range.

specialAbility.summary: For each Lightning, remove 1 extra Wound from an allied Warrior within yellow range.
